title: ffi save_identity_to_file non-atomic write can silently corrupt identity on crash
description: ffi/src/api/identity.rs save_identity_to_file() calls fs::write() which is not atomic — if the process dies mid-write, the identity file contains partial bytes; load_identity_from_file() then returns Err (corrupt, not None), so the user's identity is permanently lost with no recovery path; fix by writing to a temp file then rename(2) which is atomic on POSIX
